name: Phuket
description: Thailand's largest island — an intoxicating mix of emerald-green waters, dramatic limestone cliffs, white-sand beaches, vibrant nightlife, and a booming luxury resort scene that keeps travelers coming back.

quickInfo.visa: Visa-on-arrival 30 days for most nationalities; e-Visa available

hotels.name: Lub d Phuket Patong
hotels.description: Award-winning design hostel minutes from Patong Beach with pool and social bar

hotels.name: Kata Rocks Resort
hotels.description: Stunning cliff-top resort with infinity pool overlooking Kata Beach and the Andaman Sea

hotels.name: Centara Grand Beach Resort Phuket
hotels.description: Large beachfront resort with multiple pools, kids club, and direct beach access at Karon

hotels.name: Anantara Layan Phuket Resort
hotels.description: Secluded luxury resort on a private beach cove with jungle pool villas

hotels.name: Trisara Phuket
hotels.description: Private ocean pool villas carved into a hillside with arguably Phuket's finest views

activities.name: Phang Nga Bay & James Bond Island by Speedboat
activities.description: See the dramatic limestone karsts of Phang Nga Bay and the iconic Bond island

activities.name: Phi Phi Islands Full-Day Snorkeling Tour
activities.description: Visit Maya Bay (The Beach film location), snorkel coral reefs, and explore Phi Phi Don

activities.name: Old Phuket Town Food & Culture Walk
activities.description: Explore Sino-Portuguese heritage streets and taste 8+ Phuket street food specialties

activities.name: ATV & Zipline Adventure in Phuket Jungle
activities.description: Race ATVs through jungle trails then fly through the rainforest canopy on ziplines

activities.name: Big Buddha & Chalong Temple Tour
activities.description: Visit the 45m marble Big Buddha statue and Phuket's holiest temple with panoramic views

items.activity: Rent a scooter, drive to Old Phuket Town
Old Town food walk & Sino-Portuguese street art
Bangla Road nightlife or Banzaan Market dinner
Pickup for Phang Nga Bay speedboat tour
James Bond Island & limestone karsts kayaking
Surin Beach dinner at beachside restaurant
Snorkel at coral gardens near Phi Phi Leh
Lunch at Phi Phi Don village
Maya Bay beach visit (The Beach film spot)
Return ferry, arrive Phuket by sunset

practicalInfo.gettingThere: Phuket International Airport (HKT) has direct flights from Singapore, KL, Hong Kong, Seoul, and all major Asian hubs. Bangkok to Phuket: 1h30min, many daily flights from $25.
practicalInfo.localTransport: Grab works in Phuket (always use it — metered taxis notorious for overcharging). Scooter rental $8-12/day. Shared songthaew between beaches $20-40. No public buses.
